ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code unique to each county */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "fema_region" TEXT /* FEMA region associated with the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Population living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Population living in rural areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_stats" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded statistics */,
  "cases_last_7_days" INTEGER /* COVID-19 cases reported in the last 7 days */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total COVID-19 cases reported */,
  "deaths_last_7_days" INTEGER /* COVID-19 deaths reported in the last 7 days */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total COVID-19 deaths reported */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases reported on the given date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the given date */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Case fatality rate (deaths per 100 cases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded testing statistics */,
  "total_positive_tests_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Total positive tests in the last 7 days */,
  "total_tests_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Total tests conducted in the last 7 days */,
  "test_positivity_rate_last_7_days" REAL /* Test positivity rate in the last 7 days */,
  "new_positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new positive tests reported on the given date */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted on the given date */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Test positivity rate on the given date */,
  "testing_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Testing rate per 100,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded hospitalization statistics */,
  "confirmed_covid_hosp_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Confirmed COVID-19 hospitalizations in the last 7 days */,
  "suspected_covid_hosp_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Suspected COVID-19 hospitalizations in the last 7 days */,
  "new_confirmed_covid_hosp" INTEGER /* Number of new confirmed COVID-19 hospitalizations on the given date */,
  "new_suspected_covid_hosp" INTEGER /* Number of new suspected COVID-19 hospitalizations on the given date */,
  "total_covid_hosp" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 hospitalizations on the given date */,
  "hosp_fatality_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization fatality rate (deaths per 100 hospitalizations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "bed_capacity" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded bed usage statistics */,
  "pct_inpatient_beds_used_avg_last_7_days" REAL /* Average percentage of inpatient beds used in the last 7 days */,
  "pct_icu_beds_used_avg_last_7_days" REAL /* Average percentage of ICU beds used in the last 7 days */,
  "total_inpatient_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of inpatient beds available */,
  "total_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds available */,
  "inpatient_beds_used" INTEGER /* Number of inpatient beds currently in use */,
  "icu_beds_used" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "ventilator_usage" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded ventilator usage statistics */,
  "pct_vents_used_avg_last_7_days" REAL /* Average percentage of ventilators used in the last 7 days */,
  "total_vents" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators available */,
  "vents_used" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_metrics" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for percentage change metrics */,
  "cases_pct_change_from_prev_week" REAL /* Percentage change of cases from the previous week */,
  "deaths_pct_change_from_prev_week" REAL /* Percentage change of deaths from the previous week */,
  "new_cases_pct_change_from_prev_week" REAL /* Percentage change of new cases from the previous week */,
  "new_deaths_pct_change_from_prev_week" REAL /* Percentage change of new deaths from the previous week */,
  "recovered_cases_pct_change_from_prev_week" REAL /* Percentage change of recovered cases from the previous week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_rates" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded hospitalization rates */,
  "confirmed_covid_hosp_per_100_beds_last_7_days" REAL /* Confirmed COVID-19 hospitalizations per 100 beds in the last 7 days */,
  "suspected_covid_hosp_per_100_beds_last_7_days" REAL /* Suspected COVID-19 hospitalizations per 100 beds in the last 7 days */,
  "total_confirmed_covid_hosp_per_100_beds" REAL /* Total confirmed COVID-19 hospitalizations per 100 beds */,
  "total_suspected_covid_hosp_per_100_beds" REAL /* Total suspected COVID-19 hospitalizations per 100 beds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)
